caption: A podcast recording takes place in a studio featuring a white wall decorated with framed photographs and a "BOSS HUSTLE" banner. In the first scene, a man wearing glasses, a white shirt with a red bowtie, tan suspenders, a tall grey wig, and headphones speaks into a professional microphone. On-screen graphics display "BOSS TALK 101" and "BOSS TALK PODCAST." The scene then shifts to a second man wearing a black baseball cap, headphones, and a black t-shirt that reads "CHECK IT!". He is positioned in front of a similar microphone and the same "BOSS TALK 101" and "BOSS TALK PODCAST" logos. While the first man is seen only once, the second man appears in the remaining three sequences, remaining largely stationary while looking slightly off-camera. He wears a gold watch and a bracelet on his left wrist, which is held up near his face.
